rule: Only commit raw samples when the source clearly permits redistribution or uses CC0/public-domain terms. Royalty-free-for-music-only packs stay as import/source links.

redistributablePacks.name: Signature Sounds - Trap Vault Drum Loops
redistributablePacks.redistribution: source page says License: CC0, free to use in any project, no credit required
redistributablePacks.downloadNote: 49 tempo-labeled trap drum loops, approx 40MB unzipped. Best current trap-loop target for The Sampla.

redistributablePacks.name: Producer Space - 18 CC0 Public Domain Sample Packs
redistributablePacks.format: WAV / MIDI / construction kits depending on pack
redistributablePacks.redistribution: allowed by CC0/public-domain statement on source page
redistributablePacks.downloadNote: 2.3GB Mega download, 18 packs, 2,000+ samples. Best big CC0 source harvest.

redistributablePacks.name: SoundSpool - Chill Lofi Epiano Loop 80 BPM
redistributablePacks.redistribution: source page says public domain CC0, no attribution required

redistributablePacks.name: SoundSpool - Drum n Bass Loop Drum + Perc
redistributablePacks.redistribution: source page says public domain CC0, no attribution required

redistributablePacks.name: Pixabay - CC0 / Public-Domain Percussion Loop Search
redistributablePacks.license: filter per item: CC0 / public domain only
redistributablePacks.redistribution: use only items explicitly marked CC0/public-domain

sourceOnlyPacks.name: MusicRadar SampleRadar Hub
sourceOnlyPacks.licenseSummary: Royalty-free for music production, but redistribution is prohibited. Use as local import only.

sourceOnlyPacks.name: New Loops Free Trap Kit 2
sourceOnlyPacks.licenseSummary: Royalty-free for songs, redistribution not allowed. Use local import only.

sourceOnlyPacks.name: Dylann Taylor - SUPER 16-BIT SOUNDS
sourceOnlyPacks.licenseSummary: CC0 for use in projects, but source says do not redistribute files as standalone assets. Use local import or bundled only inside a project build.
